data.body: S1 VALIDATED: held-out oracle 10/10 green against subagent impl (implementer saw only happy-path). Mutation teeth: disabling DNS-rebinding protection -> host/origin test RED (caught). Merged edge/E2E into committed test file + added one-empty-allowlist discriminating case (16 tests). Pre-flight: make lint clean, make typecheck clean (326 files), make test exit 0 (full suite green). Committing S1.
